title: Improved Rails (TURNABLE POWERED RAILS)
description: Underwater-version Rails! Rails that's always activated!
body:
# 🚆 Improved Rails

**A Minecraft mod that expands the rail system** with functional upgrades, underwater compatibility, glowing rails, and conversion tools — making your transportation system faster, cleaner, and more flexible.

---

## WARNING: ONLY VERSION >= 1.0.2 HAS THIS TYPE OF RAIL!!!!
## 🔁 Turnable Powered Rails

These rails allow **minecarts to turn**, bypassing vanilla direction constraints. Ideal for compact intersections, custom junctions, or creative track designs.

- ![Texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b18b2b8c0406739676edc57445fb9dbf578e8b95.png) **Powered Turnable Rail**  
  A Powered Rail that supports smooth turning for advanced routing.

- ![Texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26b0dee123953a3d8b19c27893a13db20a1361b6.png) **Always-Powered Turnable Rail**  
  Like the above, but it’s **always active** — no redstone needed.

- ![Texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c3caf4212b7c276fc9d27c3fb755a7e393f54a7.png) **Underwater Powered Turnable Rail**  
  Works like the Powered Turnable Rail, but optimized for underwater tracks with zero friction.

- ![Texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d46334770d81e93d61035894348ca20acc7f9b11.png) **Underwater Always-Powered Turnable Rail**  
  A fully autonomous turnable rail for underwater use — **always powered and friction-free**.


---

## 🚧 Improved Vanilla Rails

These rails are enhanced versions of vanilla rails — no more redstone struggles!

- ![Texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26b0dee123953a3d8b19c27893a13db20a1361b6.png) **Always-Activated Rail**  
  Like a Powered Rail, but **always powered**, no redstone needed!

- ![Texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91b78dde1433ea64d640bf2db7f60d513c38f455.png) **Powered Rail with Redstone**  
  A Powered Rail **infused with redstone** – think of it as a built-in redstone block.

- ![Texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e52eca655d6ea28c32ff7f64abefd34d4e35e03.png) **Activator Rail with Detector**  
  A smart Activator Rail that behaves like it's always connected to a **detector rail module**.

---

## 🌊 Underwater Rails

These rails are modified to **eliminate water friction**, allowing for **smooth minecart travel underwater**. Great for underwater bases, ocean rail systems, and aquatic adventures.

There are **7 types**:

- ![Texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c62cc5c2ee9127b388ead97ede5fd59a7603c75.png) **Underwater Rail**  
  A normal rail adapted for underwater use.

- ![Texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c3caf4212b7c276fc9d27c3fb755a7e393f54a7.png) **Underwater Powered Rail**  
  Works like a Powered Rail but optimized for underwater.

- ![Texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d46334770d81e93d61035894348ca20acc7f9b11.png) **Underwater Always-Powered Rail**  
  A self-powered rail with no redstone needed, even underwater.

- ![Texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25ab6e03241524b7201c2960a25e3a931ee2d29b.png) **Underwater Detector Rail**  
  Underwater-compatible Detector Rail.

- ![Texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b3955e6a15637e833682c9187df4a9e88819302.png) **Underwater Activator Rail**  
  Activates minecarts even underwater.

- ![Texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91b78dde1433ea64d640bf2db7f60d513c38f455.png) **Underwater Powered Rail with Redstone**  
  Combines redstone functionality with underwater performance.

- ![Texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dea3bc59e3bff607c18add6e1f5ed24a698aadc5.png) **Underwater Activator Rail with Detector**  
  A combo of Activator and Detector functions, fine-tuned for underwater usage.

> Developers: You can tag your own custom rails in `#irails:underwater_rails` to remove water friction automatically!

---

## 💡 Light-Version Rails

These rails glow, making them perfect for illuminating dark minecart tracks.

- ![Texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a633a056f9bb0d2fb0196f5ea1a3a03c6171479.png) **Light Powered Rail**  
  A **glowing** Powered Rail that provides the same functionality as regular Powered Rails but with extra brightness!

- ![Texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43e70fa94f892e8cd44b9af24407c2c5a92d77f1.png) **Light Always-Powered Rail**  
  A **glowing** Always-Powered Rail that does not require any redstone, keeping your tracks always illuminated!

- ![Texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25157781aa68b7dded9c084a0011ac859f0381fe.png) **Light Powered Rail with Redstone**  
  A **glowing** Powered Rail that combines redstone power with built-in light for added visual appeal.

- ![Texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/137c4e47bd05c28df2ab3351718913907920c954.png) **Light Underwater Powered Rail**  
  A **glowing** underwater version of the Powered Rail, perfect for underwater transportation.

- ![Texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e482081317edf99635be19798f8346cf02557028.png) **Light Underwater Always-Powered Rail**  
  A **glowing** underwater Always-Powered Rail with no redstone required.

- ![Texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1eb398b124cc7f7aa38ac444395aea0477ec7d55.png) **Light Underwater Powered Rail with Redstone**  
  A **glowing** underwater Powered Rail that uses redstone to power your underwater track system.

---

## 🪄 Magic Wands

Two handy tools to convert rails instantly!

- ![Texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e5f115fe218c9e52b384276d1e9479f75c5209f.png) **💡 Light Wand**  
  Right-click on any rail to convert it into a **light rail** (glowing variant).  
  *Consumes 1 Coal from your inventory.*

- ![Texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c983cf690aad7add667d38c850defbe22cf1331f.png) **🌊 Underwater Wand**  
  Right-click on any rail to convert it into an **underwater rail**.  
  *Consumes 1 Prismarine Shard from your inventory.*

> Thanks to [Font generator](https://www.textstudio.com/)
> > Which I used to make the icon.
